entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange within the Crypto.com ecosystem, launched in November 2019 and currently offering spot, margin, derivatives, staking, and institutional trading services.
entity.notes: The launch date is refined from a year-level 2019 marker to November 2019. November 1 is used as a month-level marker because the accessible launch materials establish the month but not a single canonical public-launch day.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2019 and still operating under the Crypto.com Exchange brand.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange within the Crypto.com ecosystem, launched in November 2019 and currently offering spot, margin, derivatives, staking, and institutional trading services.
changes.notes: The launch date is refined from a year-level 2019 marker to November 2019. November 1 is used as a month-level marker because the accessible launch materials establish the month but not a single canonical public-launch day.

events.title: Crypto.com Exchange launched in November 2019
events.description: Crypto.com launched its dedicated cryptocurrency exchange product in November 2019 as part of the broader Crypto.com ecosystem.
events.notes: November 1 is used as a month-level marker.

evidence.title: Crypto.com Exchange launch materials
evidence.notes: Official product materials establish the November 2019 exchange launch period.

evidence.title: Crypto.com Exchange official platform
evidence.notes: The official exchange domain verifies current trading services.
